summary: Attacker compromised 5 of 9 Ronin validator private keys (4 from Sky Mavis nodes plus the Axie DAO validator) and submitted forged withdrawal transactions.
attack_trace: Compromise Sky Mavis validator keys via spear-phishing
Reuse Axie DAO whitelisted RPC to sign as 5th validator
Submit withdraw signatures to bridge contract, drain ETH + USDC
root_cause: Ronin's 5/9 multi-sig threshold combined with operational permission flaws in the Axie DAO RPC allowed key collection without on-chain anomaly.
